mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_reply (board_id, username, reply_content, deleted, parents_reply_id) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{userName}, #{replyContent}, 0, #{parentsReplyId} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.reply_id AS replyId, r.board_id AS boardId, r.username AS userName, r.reply_content AS replyContent, r.deleted, r.parents_reply_id AS parentsReplyId, m.nickname AS nickName, pm.nickname AS targetNickName FROM board_reply r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.username = m.username LEFT JOIN board_reply br ON r.parents_reply_id = br.reply_id LEFT JOIN member pm ON br.username = pm.username WHERE r.board_id = #{boardId} AND (r.parents_reply_id IS NULL OR r.deleted = 0) ORDER BY IFNULL(r.parents_reply_id, r.reply_id) ASC, r.reply_id ASC;
